name: PsExec Remote Execution
description: Detects use of PsExec or similar tools for remote command execution
query:
// PsExec Detection
// Remote execution via PsExec/SMB
events from endpoint
where process_name = "psexec.exe"
  or (process_name = "cmd.exe" and parent_process_name = "services.exe")
  or event_type = "psexec_execution"
group by source_hostname, target_hostname, username
having count(*) >= 1
within 60 seconds
